description_long: This is a modern bed with a dark, matte-finished wooden frame featuring a prominent rectangular headboard and a matching footboard. The bed is equipped with a thick, white mattress and two white pillows, both neatly arranged. The headboard has a paneled design, adding a touch of sophistication and structure to the overall look. The frame is solid and robust, with wide side rails and sturdy legs, suggesting durability and stability. A small, decorative pink object is placed on the mattress, providing a subtle accent. The bed's design is clean and functional, suitable for contemporary urban interiors.
description: A modern, dark wood bed with a paneled headboard, white mattress, and pillows, featuring a clean and sturdy design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the bed, the paneled headboard, white mattress, pillows, and a pink decorative object near the headboard.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the solid, rectangular headboard and the sturdy frame, with minimal mattress visibility.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the bed's length, white bedding, and the pink decorative object now near the footboard.
description_view_3: Front view showing the footboard, the full width of the mattress, pillows, and the paneled headboard in the background.
